item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-06 - Today's Summary
item.description: The dominant pattern today is sustained momentum in the MCP / Tool Calling category, where three projects averaged 884 daily stars. Agent-Reach (789 stars/day) and MemPalace (482 stars/day) both appear on GitHub Trending and have been hot for multiple days, indicating developer interest in giving AI agents universal read access to platforms and local-first memory. The cross-source signal is weak — only one project appeared on both GitHub and HN — but the category's consistent velocity suggests a deepening focus on agent-tool integration rather than a flash-in-the-pan spike. Meanwhile, the Coding Agent category remains steady with Graphify (767 stars/day) and others, but no new breakout projects emerged. The quietness in AI Workflow Automation and RAG may indicate attention shifting toward more granular tool-calling capabilities. Top projects: Panniantong/Agent-Reach, mvanhorn/last30days-skill, MemPalace/mempalace, safishamsi/graphify, lfnovo/open-notebook, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, CopilotKit/CopilotKit, nexu-io/open-design, santifer/career-ops, PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR, affaan-m/ECC Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+789 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: A zero-API-fee CLI that gives AI agents eyes to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — install once, use everywhere. Why it matters: With 21,962 stars and a 24-hour delta of +697, this project is sustaining explosive growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), meaning the growth is steady rather than a sudden spike — but the absolute numbers are massive. It's clearly filling a real pain point for AI developers who want their agents to browse the web without paying for APIs or writing custom scrapers. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' — tooling that makes AI agents self-sufficient on the web. The MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration is a key enabler, and the project's success shows that developers want their agents to be able to browse, search, and extract information from any platform without manual intervention. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] mvanhorn/last30days-skill (+784 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. Why it matters: With 28,083 stars, 2,386 forks, and a 24-hour delta of +814 stars, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. The recent v3 release and active commits (within 7 days) keep the momentum fresh. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward agent-based research that bypasses traditional search engines. For AI developers, it shows the value of bridging walled-garden platforms and using engagement signals (upvotes, likes, market odds) as ranking signals. The modular skill architecture (via Agent Skills) is a pattern worth adopting. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] MemPalace/mempalace (+482 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first AI memory system with verbatim storage, pluggable backends, and 96.6% R@5 on LongMemEval — no API calls required. Why it matters: With 54,075 stars and a 24-hour delta of +443, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1.0), indicating steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. It has a recent release and commits within 7 days, showing active maintenance. The rule-based score of 61 and 'sustained_hot' trend type confirm it's a consistently popular tool in the AI memory space. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward local-first, privacy-preserving AI infrastructure. Developers can now add persistent memory to their LLM workflows without vendor lock-in, using a system that outperforms cloud alternatives on retrieval recall. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] safishamsi/graphify (+767 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Graphify turns any codebase, docs, or media into a queryable knowledge graph for AI coding assistants. Why it matters: With 60,136 stars and a 24-hour delta of +613, Graphify is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic adoption rather than a sudden spike. The project has a recent release and commits within 7 days, showing active maintenance. This is a mature, widely adopted tool in the AI coding assistant ecosystem. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward structured knowledge management in AI-assisted development. Instead of relying on raw file context, developers can now build and query a semantic graph of their entire project. This reduces token usage, improves answer quality, and enables cross-modal understanding (code + docs + images). The trend suggests that knowledge graphs will become a standard component of AI coding workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] lfnovo/open-notebook (+1189 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Open-source, self-hosted alternative to Google Notebook LM with multi-model AI support, podcast generation, and privacy-first design. Why it matters: The project has 25,724 stars and gained 1,304 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating strong and sustained attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), suggesting steady organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent velocity makes it a reliable project to watch for developers interested in AI-powered note-taking and research tools. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward decentralized AI applications where users demand control over data and model selection. The multi-provider approach reduces dependency on single vendors and aligns with the growing 'local-first' AI movement. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+607 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go with prefix-cache stability and MCP plugin support. Why it matters: With 18,748 stars, a 24-hour delta of +607, and a 7-day average delta of 735.1, this project is experiencing sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 indicates steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike, making it a reliable signal of developer interest in DeepSeek-native tooling. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward model-specific agents that leverage unique model features (like prefix caching) for competitive advantage. Developers should consider building agents that are tightly integrated with a single model's strengths rather than generic multi-model tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+747 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to autonomous swarms, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 29,096 stars, a 7-day delta of 7,996 stars, and a 3-day average delta of 3,693, this repo is experiencing explosive organic growth. The 24-hour delta of 610 stars and medium acceleration (0.2) indicate sustained, high-velocity attention. The curriculum's promise to bridge the 84% usage vs. 18% preparedness gap resonates strongly as AI adoption accelerates. Developer insight: The demand for structured, from-scratch AI education is massive and growing. Developers are moving beyond API wrappers and seeking foundational understanding. This repo signals a shift toward 'deep learning' in the literal sense—building internal models of how AI works, not just using black-box tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] CopilotKit/CopilotKit (+751 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CopilotKit is a multi-platform SDK for building agent-native applications with Generative UI, shared state, and human-in-the-loop workflows across React, Angular, Vue, React Native, Slack, and Teams. Why it matters: The project is experiencing a sudden breakout with a 24h star delta of 751, a 7d delta of 1155, and a high acceleration of 6.3 (threshold >2.0). Total stars at 32,999 with 4,220 forks indicate massive community traction. The recent release and active commits (within 7 days) suggest sustained momentum. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native UI frameworks that abstract away the complexity of integrating LLMs with frontend state management. Developers should evaluate CopilotKit for projects requiring dynamic, stateful agent interactions across web and mobile. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+1006 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Open Design is an open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Design that turns your coding agent into a design engine, generating prototypes, decks, images, and videos from a single design system. Why it matters: With 59,975 stars and a 7-day average delta of 575.7 stars/day, Open Design is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24h delta of 1,006 and acceleration of 1.7 indicate strong, ongoing interest. The recent 0.9.0 release with an integrated Model Router removes setup friction, making it instantly usable. This is not a flash-in-the-pan spike but a steady climb driven by real adoption. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design tools where the CLI becomes the primary interface for creating UI artifacts. Developers should watch how Open Design's approach to design-as-code (DESIGN.md) and MCP-based integration could become a standard pattern for generative design workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] santifer/career-ops (+302 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: An open-source AI-powered job search command center that uses Claude Code and other AI CLIs to evaluate, tailor, and track applications at scale. Why it matters: With 48,963 stars, a 24-hour delta of +223, and a 7-day delta of +1,116, this repo is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.3 indicates steady, organic momentum rather than a sudden spike. The project has a recent release and active commits within the last 7 days, signaling ongoing maintenance and community engagement. It's trending because it directly addresses a universal pain point — job hunting — with a practical, AI-driven solution that resonates with a massive audience. Developer insight: Career-Ops signals a shift toward AI-as-infrastructure for personal productivity. Developers should watch for similar 'AI command center' patterns emerging in other domains (e.g., personal finance, health, learning). The project's architecture — using AI to orchestrate sub-agents, parse unstructured data, and generate structured outputs — is a template for building reliable, user-facing AI tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR (+776 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages. Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +776，前 3 日均值 263.3，加速度 2.9x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] affaan-m/ECC (+1380 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1380，总 stars 208,854，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low
